title: TFC Caelum
description: Making Caelum compatible with and use TerraFirmaCrafts calendar and season system plus more
body:
This is an addon for [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) that bridges the mechanics and features of [Caelum](https://modrinth.com/mod/caelum) to elements of TerraFirmaCraft, such as its calendar and season system. This addon further expands upon the features provided by Caelum, and adds the following:

- Lunar eclipses (aka blood moons)
- Solar eclipses
- Planets
- Rainbows after it has rained
- Increased surface monster presence during blood moons, and even higher if a supermoon is actual simultaneously

There's no guarantee that the mod will work with any *random* mod that *also* makes changes to e.g. the moon cycle and/or location of either the sun and/or the moon on the sky. Additionally disable TFC's `Calendar Sensitive Moon Phases` configuration, as otherwise the moon phases will be out of place.

*This naturally requires both mods in order to work.*
